modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be no spelling errors and some contradictory ordering.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to enable Live Automatic Transcriptions in Zoom.

full_description_text: The user is experiencing difficulties with enabling Live Automatic Transcriptions in Zoom. This issue arose while attempting to start the transcription feature during a meeting. The user seeks guidance on how to activate this functionality effectively.
short_description: Unable to enable Live Automatic Transcriptions in Zoom.
description: The user is experiencing difficulties with enabling Live Automatic Transcriptions in Zoom. This issue arose while attempting to start the transcription feature during a meeting. The user seeks guidance on how to activate this functionality effectively.
